bot.welcome: 👋 Welcome to the Remnawave admin bot. Control users, nodes, and billing from one place.
bot.help:
ℹ️ Quick commands:

Core:
/start — welcome
/help — this help
/health — system check
/stats — summary
/bandwidth — traffic

Users:
Users → Find user (menu) — search by username/email/Telegram ID/description
/user_create <username> <expire_iso> [telegram_id] — create user

Infra:
/nodes — list nodes
/node <uuid> — node details
/nodes_usage — realtime usage
/nodes_range <start_iso> <end_iso> — traffic by range
/hosts — list hosts
/host <uuid> — host details

Other:
/sub <short_uuid> — subscription
/tokens — API tokens
/templates — templates
/snippets — snippets
/configs — configs
/billing — billing
/providers — providers
bot.user_usage: 🔍 Use Users → Find user and type username/email/Telegram ID/description.

panel.unavailable_warning: ⚠️ Panel unavailable. Some features may not work.

actions.revoke_confirm: ⚠️ Are you sure you want to revoke subscription for user {username}? This action cannot be undone!

filter.tag_select: 🏷 Select a tag to filter by:
filter.empty_results: No results found for the selected filter.

errors.generic: ⚠️ Something went wrong. Try again later.
errors.not_found: ❌ Resource not found. It may have been deleted.
errors.network_error: 🌐 Network error. Could not connect to server.
errors.timeout_error: ⏱ Request timed out waiting for server response.
errors.validation_error: ⚠️ Data validation error. Check your input.
errors.hint_unauthorized: Check the API token in bot settings
errors.hint_not_found: Make sure the resource exists and hasn't been deleted
errors.hint_network: Check internet connection and API server availability
errors.hint_timeout: Server is overloaded or responding slowly. Try later
errors.hint_server: Server is temporarily unavailable. Try again in a few minutes
errors.hint_validation: Check the format of input data
errors.hint_generic: Try again later or contact administrator

stats.title: 📊 System overview
stats.traffic_empty: No data for the selected period.

user.happ_crypto_link_error: ⚠️ Failed to get Happ crypto link.
user.traffic_by_nodes_title: 📊 Traffic statistics by nodes 👤 User: {username} Select period:
user.stats.custom_period_not_implemented: ⚠️ Custom period is not implemented yet.
user.prompt_username:
🆕 Enter username (letters/numbers/hyphen).

Example: user123 or my-user
user.prompt_expire: ⏳ When should it expire? Pick a preset or send ISO date (e.g. 2025-02-01T00:00:00Z).
user.invalid_expire: ⚠️ Invalid date. Send ISO format (e.g.: 2025-02-01T00:00:00Z) or use a preset.
user.prompt_traffic:
📶 Traffic limit (GB). Pick a button or send a number, 0 = unlimited.

Examples: 5, 50, 500, 0
user.invalid_traffic: ⚠️ Invalid value. Send a number in GB (e.g.: 5, 50, 500) or use a button. 0 = unlimited.
user.prompt_hwid:
💻 Device limit (HWID). Pick a button or send a number, 0 = unlimited.

Examples: 1, 2, 5, 10, 0
user.invalid_hwid: ⚠️ Invalid device limit. Send a number (e.g.: 1, 2, 5, 10) or use a button. 0 = unlimited.
user.prompt_telegram:
✈️ Enter Telegram ID (number) or skip.

Example: 123456789
user.invalid_telegram: ⚠️ Telegram ID must be a number (e.g.: 123456789). Send again or skip.
user.squad_load_failed: 🚫 Squads unavailable. Enter UUID manually or skip.
user.search_prompt: 🔎 Enter username, email, Telegram ID, or description to search.
user.search_no_results: No matches for "{query}". Try again or use the buttons below.
user.search_results: Found {count} match(es) for "{query}". Choose a user or send a new query.
user.edit_prompt: What do you want to change?
user.edit_prompt_traffic:
📶 Send limit in GB (decimals allowed, 0 = unlimited).

Examples: 5, 50.5, 500, 0
user.edit_prompt_strategy:
🔁 Send strategy (NO_RESET/DAY/WEEK/MONTH).

Examples: NO_RESET, DAY, WEEK, MONTH
user.edit_prompt_expire:
⏳ Send date as YYYY-MM-DD (time will be 00:00 UTC) or full ISO.

Examples: 2025-02-01 or 2025-02-01T00:00:00Z
user.edit_prompt_description:
📝 Send description or "-" to clear.

Example: User description
user.edit_prompt_tag:
🏷 Send tag (A-Z,0-9,_, up to 16 characters) or "-" to clear.

Examples: VIP, USER_1, TEST123
user.edit_prompt_telegram:
✈️ Send Telegram ID (number) or "-" to clear.

Example: 123456789
user.edit_prompt_email:
📧 Send email or "-" to clear.

Example: user@example.com

hwid.title: 💻 Device management (HWID)
hwid.click_to_delete: 💡 Click on a device to delete it

user.hwid.title: 💻 Device management (HWID)
user.hwid.click_to_delete: 💡 Click on a device to delete it
user.edit_invalid_number: ⚠️ Invalid number. Enter a number (e.g.: 5, 50.5, 0). Try again.
user.edit_invalid_strategy:
⚠️ Strategy must be one of: NO_RESET, DAY, WEEK, MONTH.

Example: DAY
user.edit_invalid_expire: ⚠️ Invalid date. Use ISO format (e.g.: 2025-02-01 or 2025-02-01T00:00:00Z).
user.edit_invalid_tag:
⚠️ Tag must contain only A-Z, 0-9, _ and be 1-16 characters long.

Examples: VIP, USER_1, TEST123

node.usage: 🛰 Send /node <uuid> to view and manage a node.
node.delete_confirm: ⚠️ Are you sure you want to delete node {name}? This action cannot be undone!
node.update_not_implemented: Node update is not implemented yet.
node.edit_prompt_port: Enter new node port (1-65535) or "-" to remove:
node.edit_prompt_country_code: Enter new country code (2 characters, e.g. US) or "-" to remove:
node.edit_prompt_traffic_limit: Enter new traffic limit in GB or "-" to remove:
node.edit_prompt_notify_percent: Enter new notify percent (0-100) or "-" to remove:
node.edit_prompt_traffic_reset_day: Enter new traffic reset day (1-31) or "-" to remove:
node.edit_prompt_consumption_multiplier: Enter new consumption multiplier or "-" to remove:
node.edit_prompt_tags: Enter new tags separated by comma or "-" to remove:
node.prompt_name:
🛰 Create Node

Enter node name (3-30 characters):
node.no_profiles: ⚠️ No config profiles found. Create a profile first.
node.invalid_port: ⚠️ Port must be a number between 1 and 65535.
node.invalid_country: ⚠️ Country code must be 2 characters (e.g.: RU, US).
node.invalid_traffic_limit: ⚠️ Traffic limit must be a positive number.
node.invalid_notify_percent: ⚠️ Notification percent must be between 0 and 100.
node.invalid_reset_day: ⚠️ Reset day must be between 1 and 31.
node.invalid_tags: ⚠️ Tags must match format: A-Z0-9_:, max 10 tags.
node.delete_confirm: ⚠️ Are you sure you want to delete node {name}? This action cannot be undone!
node.bulk_profile_select_nodes: Select nodes to modify config profile:
node.bulk_profile_success: ✅ Config profile successfully modified for {count} nodes.

Choose an action for bulk operations on nodes.
bulk_nodes.select_profile: Select a profile to assign to all nodes:

bulk.title: 📦 Bulk actions:
bulk.overview:
📦 Bulk for users:
• Quick: reset all, delete expired, extend all +7/+30.
• Lists: /bulk_delete <uuid...>, /bulk_revoke <uuid...>, /bulk_reset <uuid...>, /bulk_extend <days> <uuid...>, /bulk_status <STATUS> <uuid...>.
• Statuses: ACTIVE/DISABLED/LIMITED/EXPIRED. UUID separated by spaces or newlines.
bulk.template_extend_active: ⏳ Extend active users by N days
bulk.prompt_extend_active:
⏳ Enter number of days to extend subscriptions for active users:

Example: 7 (extend by 7 days)
Example: 30 (extend by 30 days)
bulk.done_extend_active: ✅ Subscriptions extended by {days} days for {count} active users.
